data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The root-cause hypothesis in src/components/ui/select.tsx is plausible, but the verification scope does not satisfy the acceptance criteria as written. In multi-select mode, FilterBar renders BulkEditControls instead of FilterControls, so this state exposes 4 Select pulldowns, not 7. A FilterBar-only Storybook scenario would also miss the header-level RepoSwitcher pulldown that is explicitly called out in acceptance. Revise the plan to validate the actual Queues View composition with multi-select active, add automated browser coverage for RepoSwitcher and any other pulldowns present in that view, and ensure the test runs in a scrollable non-zero-scroll scenario so viewport-stability assertions are meaningful.
